zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Milbourne於1435年8月1日出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾提林頓時，她的父親John Milbourne32歲，母親Elizabeth Anne Devereux23歲。她和Thomas Walwyn至少有14個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1522年8月14日在英國享年87歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Milbourne于1435年8月1日出生在英国英格兰賀福爾提林頓时，她的父亲John Milbourne32岁，母亲Elizabeth Anne Devereux23岁。她和Thomas Walwyn至少有14个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1522年8月14日在英国享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: Milbourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Milburn
meanings: English (Northumberland, Cumberland and Durham): habitational name from any of the places in Westmorland, Northumberland, Somerset, Dorset or Wiltshire, all derived from Old English myln ‘mill’ + burna ‘spring, stream’. There has been some confusion with Melbourne .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Milbourne was born on 1 August 1435, in Tillington, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Milbourne, was 32 and her mother, Elizabeth Anne Devereux, was 23. She had at least 14 sons and 4 daughters with Thomas Walwyn. She died on 14 August 1522, in England, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Milbourne est née le 1 août 1435, à Tillington, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Milbourne, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Anne Devereux, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 14 fils et 4 filles avec Thomas Walwyn. Elle est décédée le 14 août 1522, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Milbourne am 1. August 1435 in Tillington, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Milbourne 32 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Anne Devereux 23. Sie hatte mit Thomas Walwyn mindestens 14 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. August 1522 im Alter von 87 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Milbourne è nata il il 1 agosto 1435 nel Tillington, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Milbourne, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Anne Devereux, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 14 figli e 4 figlie con Thomas Walwyn. Morì il 14 agosto 1522, nel England, all'età di 87 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Milbourne(이)가 1435년 8월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 틸링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Milbourne(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Anne Devereux(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Thomas Walwyn(와)과 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1522년 8월 14일 영국에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Milbourne родилась 1 августа 1435 г. в местности тиллингтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Milbourne было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Anne Devereux, 23. У неё было по крайней мере 14 сыновей и 4 дочери от Thomas Walwyn. Она умерла 14 августа 1522 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 87 лет.
